title: Shot List
description: Complete panel-by-panel shot plan for comic-story pipeline. Produced by shot-plan stage, consumed by preview and generate stages. Supports per-panel expression, pose, camera angle, and atmosphere variation for natural image diversity.

art_style.description: Name of the locked art style preset or custom style

style_lock.description: Style keywords carried forward from style_decision

panels.description: Ordered list of panels (shots) for the comic

duration_seconds.description: Display duration for this panel in seconds

visual_description.description: Panel-specific action/scene description (what's unique to THIS panel)

character_anchors.description: Character names appearing in this panel (keys into character_registry)

scene_template.description: Scene name key into scene_registry for this panel's setting

camera_angle.description: Camera angle for this panel — varies per panel even within the same scene. Examples: '中景平视，从厨房门口看向操作台', '近景俯角，聚焦人物手部动作', '中景侧角，从窗户方向逆光拍摄'

atmosphere.description: Lighting and mood atmosphere for this panel — driven by the beat's emotion. Examples: '午后阳光透过纱帘，温暖宁静', '黄昏暖黄灯光，空气中飘着尘埃', '阴天白光灯，冷清安静'

expression.description: Per-character expression and pose for this panel. Keyed by character name (matching character_registry keys).

emotion.description: The emotional beat for this character in this panel (操心, 惊讶, 开心, 悲伤, 尴尬, 释然, 决心, etc.)

facial_expression.description: Specific facial cues: eyebrows, eyes, mouth, cheeks. Must vary from other panels.

body_language.description: Pose, gestures, body orientation, what hands are doing.

action.description: What the character is actively doing in this moment.

scene_texts.description: Text that is part of the scene itself (signs, screens, etc.)

content.description: The text content to appear in the scene

carrier.description: What carries the text (e.g., wooden sign, phone screen, book cover)

length.description: Character count of the text content

method.description: ai_draw: Seedream renders the text directly. post_only: PIL overlay in caption stage.

text_overlay.description: Narrative text overlaid on top of the image (hook, dialogue, narration)

content.description: The text to overlay on the image

position.description: Where to place the text overlay on the panel

style.description: Typographic style for the overlay text

character_registry.description: All characters appearing in the comic, keyed by character name. Each character has immutable core_traits and a per-panel expression is designed separately per panel.

core_traits.description: IMMUTABLE physical identity description used verbatim in every prompt. Covers: age, face shape, facial features, hair, body type, clothing, skin, signature accessories. Does NOT include expression or emotion — those vary per panel.

role.description: Character role in the story (protagonist, antagonist, supporting, etc.)

reference_image_path.description: Path to the character's three-view reference image generated in the preview stage. Passed as reference_image to Seedream in the generate stage.

emotion_range.description: Emotions this character displays across all panels (for variety planning)

panels.description: Panel numbers where this character appears

scene_registry.description: All unique scenes/settings in the comic, keyed by scene name. Each scene has a master description library with camera angles and atmosphere variants.

master_description.description: Core scene description — the fixed elements that make this scene recognizable (room layout, furniture, color scheme, key props). Used in every prompt for this scene.

camera_angles.description: Library of camera angles for this scene. Different panels in the same scene pick different angles for variety. Min 2 required.

atmosphere_variants.description: Library of lighting/atmosphere variants for this scene. Different panels pick different atmospheres based on the beat's emotion. Min 2 required.

reference_image_path.description: Path to the scene sample image generated in the preview stage (for human confirmation only — NOT passed as reference_image to Seedream)

panels.description: Panel numbers where this scene appears

character_description.description: Visual description of the storyteller character for the outro

signature_text.description: Signature phrase or tagline for the outro

panels.description: Panel numbers for the IP outro panels

total_panels.description: Total number of panels including IP outro
